itinerary.route: Southern California Desert — Campo to Kennedy Meadows
itinerary.mapNote: Section 1/5 · SoCal Desert · Mexican border at Campo. Mojave heat, 20-mile water carries. San Jacinto 3302m. Vasquez Rocks. 702 miles.

itinerary.route: High Sierra — Kennedy Meadows to South Lake Tahoe
itinerary.overnight: Rae Lakes / Tyndall Creek / Muir Trail Ranch
itinerary.mapNote: Section 2/5 · High Sierra · Forester Pass 4009m — highest point on PCT. Full JMT overlap. Muir Hut. Bear canisters mandatory. The crown of the trail. 315 miles.

itinerary.route: Northern California — South Lake Tahoe to Oregon Border
itinerary.overnight: Drakesbad Guest Ranch / Burney Falls State Park
itinerary.mapNote: Section 3/5 · NorCal Cascades · Desolation Wilderness. Lassen Volcanic NP. Burney Falls. Long resupply gaps. Active fire risk. 675 miles.

itinerary.route: Oregon Cascade Crest — Oregon Border to Bridge of the Gods
itinerary.overnight: Timberline Lodge / Mazama Village / Cascade Locks
itinerary.mapNote: Section 4/5 · Oregon · Crater Lake rim walk. Three Sisters Wilderness. Mount Hood. Timberline Lodge. Oregon's fast, flat miles — the 'Oregon bubble'. 456 miles.

itinerary.route: Washington North Cascades — Bridge of the Gods to Manning Park
itinerary.overnight: Stehekin / Glacier Peak camps / Manning Park Lodge
itinerary.mapNote: Section 5/5 · Washington · Goat Rocks knife-edge. Glacier Peak Wilderness. North Cascades. Monument 78 at Canadian border. The hardest and most spectacular state. 506 miles.

waypoints.name: Campo Southern Terminus
waypoints.note: Monument 1 at the Mexican border wall. The NOBO start for most PCT hikers.

waypoints.name: San Jacinto Peak
waypoints.note: Optional aerial-tram-accessed peak above Palm Springs. One of California's finest viewpoints.

waypoints.name: Kennedy Meadows
waypoints.note: End of the desert, start of the Sierra. Bear canisters become mandatory. Resupply and rest.

waypoints.name: Forester Pass
waypoints.note: Highest point on the entire PCT. Steep snow chutes in early season. Notched into a granite wall.

waypoints.name: Muir Trail Ranch
waypoints.note: Remote High Sierra resupply. No road access — float buckets pre-sent by hikers.

waypoints.name: Crater Lake
waypoints.note: The deepest lake in North America. Impossibly blue. Rim walk at 2000m with full crater views.

waypoints.name: Timberline Lodge
waypoints.note: Historic Mount Hood lodge. Hot meals, beds, and the famous PCT hiker welcome since 1937.

waypoints.name: Goat Rocks Wilderness
waypoints.note: The knife-edge ridge above glaciers with Mount Rainier dominating. The finest day in Washington.

waypoints.name: Monument 78
waypoints.note: The northern terminus at the Canadian border. Manning Park 13 miles beyond on a dirt road.
